title: AsyncApiLockFile
description: Records the parameters used for a code generation run so subsequent runs can skip generation when nothing has changed.

specFileHash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the RFC 8785 canonical form of the spec content.

descriptionLocation.description: The original URL of the API description, if fetched from a remote source.

specVersion.description: The AsyncAPI spec version used for generation (e.g. '3.0' or '2.6').

rootNamespace.description: The root namespace for generated types.

mode.description: The generation mode: producer, consumer, or both.

includeChannels.description: The include channel patterns used for filtering.

excludeChannels.description: The exclude channel patterns used for filtering.

tags.description: The tag filters used for operation selection.

generatedFiles.description: The list of generated file names, relative to the output directory.
